info.english_meaning: to shed tearsto cryto weepto lament

upasarga_meanings.meaning: ro rokara SAMta karanA dUsare ke lie ronA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'na garBasTaH praroditi' (suSrute 1.319) uBayatra praSabdo na DAtvarTaM viSinazwi
'aTAkasmAtpravavfte tayA sADvyA praroditum' (kaTA॰10.36) praSabdaH prakarze sA sADvI uccEH krandituM pravfttetyarTaH
'avakzutamavaruditaM taTA SrAdDe ca varjayet' (BA0 anu0 9141) yasyopari aSrURi patitAni tad (annam) avaruditamucyate
'gadyapadyamayI rAjastutirvirudamucyate' (sA0 da0 570) tasyedamudAharaRam--nadanti madadantinaH parilasanti vAjivrajAH paWanti virudAvalImahitamandire vandinaH (rasagaM0)
'upArurodeva nadatpataNgaH kumudvatIM tIratarurdinAdO' (Bawwi0 24) upAruroda vilalApa paridevayAYcakre anuSuSoca
